subject: HAPPY CHANUKAH
body:
heard yesterday was a helluva day . I say "Yes, go for the angles !  "  I 
only wish you well.
Wish I was there to help you out somehow.  Keep me in  mind.    Hiring the 
needy ???? (i (loved when I made $  on my own so I could buy me or someone else 
things just because !  )
In the meantime , was hoping that gift would be something you could  smile 
about.
I heard it was a great item.  Check with you SONY STYLE  STORE  to get more 
particulars.   I know there is a headset, but  I figured you had the good BOSE 
sound one  so you can use the MP3 Player as  you read .  And the PRINT size 
can be adjusted for more comfy eyes .   ETC.
I also have the gift receipt if for any reason you need to  exchange  ....  
Special  men deserve special items they might not  buy themselves !)
 GOOD ?  How is New York ?       or call later at end of the day 954-296-0002

Then you can tell me about Sarah, too, if you want to.   Maybe I could / 
should see her in New York , if I can get there .. You let me  know.
Marcia M.



**************************************Check out AOL's list of 2007's hottest 
products.
(http://money.aol.com/special/hot-products-2007?NCID=aoltop00030000000001)
body_html:
heard yesterday was a helluva day . I say "Yes, go for the angles ! "  I only wish you well.
Wish I was there to help you out somehow.  Keep me in mind.    Hiring the needy ???? (i (loved when I made $ on my own so I could buy me or someone else things just because ! )
In the meantime , was hoping that gift would be something you could smile about.
I heard it was a great item.  Check with you SONY STYLE STORE  to get more particulars.   I know there is a headset, but I figured you had the good BOSE sound one  so you can use the MP3 Player as you read .  And the PRINT size can be adjusted for more comfy eyes .  ETC.
I also have the gift receipt if for any reason you need to exchange  ....  Special  men deserve special items they might not buy themselves !)
 GOOD ?  How is New York ?      or call later at end of the day 954-296-0002

Then you can tell me about Sarah, too, if you want to.  Maybe I could / should see her in New York , if I can get there .. You let me know.
Marcia M.
